name: wilson-decision-gate
description: Step-by-step decision gate — multi-decision work is one user-confirmation gate per decision, never batched: for each branch point present options + recommendation + rationale (3+ bullets), wait for the pick, then record `Decision N: <picked> · <rationale>` in design.md. Standalone port of wilson's principle-step-by-step-decision-gate (text-only, like wilson; CC hooks can't detect batching either). SessionStart injects the principle once; UserPromptSubmit adds a short reminder ONLY when the prompt looks like branch-point work (not every prompt). /wilson-decision-gate maintains the design.md ledger. Ships a 5-language design.md sample. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_DECISION_GATE.
